Expected_cities.csv_columns: (You can rename columns or adjust prefixes in the script.)
CityID (optional) — unique id or will use row index
Vc_flag — 1 if a city should be treated as a market to be covered (defaults to all cities)
CityID mapping used in separation.csv if you supply it
separation.csv (optional) — two columns i,k with either CityID values or integer indices (row numbers).
